category_sources: Official CloudWeGo docs describe Kitex as a high-performance extensible Go RPC framework.
source_facts.description says Kitex is a Golang RPC framework for microservices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kitex; official CloudWeGo docs and GitHub repo use Kitex.
docs_sources: Official CloudWeGo Kitex documentation is the dedicated docs site; source_facts.repo is the official GitHub README fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CloudWeGo docs identify a Go RPC microservices framework.
